summary: Full stack testing of PunchListJobs app. Found and fixed critical login bug where captchaToken guard blocked all logins when REACT_APP_RECAPTCHA_SITE_KEY is not configured. After fix, all login flows work. Backend APIs passing 8/9 (jobs list minor trailing slash issue).

minor.issue: Returns 404 without trailing slash; GET /api/jobs/ works fine. Frontend should use trailing slash or backend should redirect

integration_issues.issue: FIXED: Login was completely broken when REACT_APP_RECAPTCHA_SITE_KEY is empty. Line 67 and button disabled attr in AuthPage.jsx blocked submission when captchaToken=null (widget never loads without site key). Fixed by conditioning guard on RECAPTCHA_SITE_KEY presence.

action_items: Fix GET /api/jobs (without trailing slash) returning 404 - add redirect_slashes=True or update frontend call
Verify reCAPTCHA fix holds when REACT_APP_RECAPTCHA_SITE_KEY is set (captcha guard now skips only when key is absent)
critical_code_review_comments: AuthPage.jsx line 67+509: Captcha guard was unconditional - if RECAPTCHA_SITE_KEY empty, login is permanently blocked. Fixed in this iteration.
AuthContext.jsx fetchMe calls /api/users/me (correct) but if that fails it logs user out - silent logout on any network error could confuse users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login is now fixed. Test payments (mocked), job creation, admin user management tabs. The /api/jobs endpoint needs trailing slash.

rca_of_issue.bug: Login blocked when reCAPTCHA not configured
rca_of_issue.root_cause: AuthPage.jsx had `if (!captchaToken) return` and `disabled={loading || !captchaToken}`. When REACT_APP_RECAPTCHA_SITE_KEY is empty, ReCAPTCHA widget is not rendered, so captchaToken stays null forever, making login impossible.
rca_of_issue.fix: Changed guard to `if (RECAPTCHA_SITE_KEY && !captchaToken)` and button disabled to `disabled={loading || (RECAPTCHA_SITE_KEY ? !captchaToken : false)}`
